rationale: The ensures is an implication; the previous attempt asserted the antecedent's conjuncts at the top of the body where they are not in scope. Re-introducing the antecedent under an `if` makes the postcondition of `proc_to_page` for r1 and r2 path-conditioned facts, letting z3 lift r1.0 == proc_ptr == r2.0 and r1.1@.addr() == r2.1@.addr() pointwise — the maximal observable equalities derivable from the `proc_to_page` spec.
